zh.Baylham, Suffolk, England: 英國素福爾可貝利哈姆
zh.lifeSummary: Margaret Elizabeth Chislington是John Trehampton和Dama en Blanco的女兒，於1366年出生在英國英格蘭素福爾可貝利哈姆。她於大約1396年與William Andrews在英國英格蘭素福爾可結婚。他們至少是4個兒子的父母。她去世於1402年1月20日在英國英格蘭素福爾可享年36歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Margaret Elizabeth Chislington是John Trehampton和Dama en Blanco的女儿，于1366年出生在英国英格兰素福爾可貝利哈姆。她于大约1396年与William Andrews在英国英格兰素福爾可结婚。他们至少是4个儿子的父母。她去世于1402年1月20日在英国英格兰素福爾可享年36岁，埋葬在英国英格兰。

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

en.lifeSummary: Margaret Elizabeth Chislington was born in 1366, in Baylham, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom as the daughter of John Trehampton and Dama en Blanco. She married William Andrews about 1396, in Suffolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons. She died on 20 January 1402, in Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 36, and was buried in England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Margaret Elizabeth Chislington est née en 1366, à Baylham, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, fille de John Trehampton et Dama en Blanco. Elle a épousé William Andrews environ 1396, à Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils. Elle est décédée le 20 janvier 1402, à Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 36 ans, et a été enterrée à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Margaret Elizabeth Chislington wurde 1366 in Baylham, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, als Tochter von John Trehampton und Dama en Blanco geboren. Sie hat um 1396 in Suffolk, England, United Kingdom William Andrews geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne. Sie starb am 20. Januar 1402 im Alter von 36 Jahren in Suffolk, England, United Kingdom und wurde in England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Margaret Elizabeth Chislington è nata il nel 1366 nel Baylham, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito come figlia di John Trehampton e Dama en Blanco. Lei sposato William Andrews circa 1396, nel Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli. Morì il 20 gennaio 1402, nel Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 36 anni, e fu sepolta a Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret Elizabeth Chislingtonは1366年にイギリスイギリススフォルクバイルハムでJohn TrehamptonとDama en Blancoの娘として生まれた。約1396年にイギリスイギリススフォルクでWilliam Andrewsと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子の親であった。彼女は1402年1月20日にイギリスイギリススフォルクで36歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Elizabeth Chislington(은)는 1366년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 베이함에서 John Trehampton(와)과 Dama en Blanco의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 대략 1396년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크에서 William Andrews(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1402년 1월 20일 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크에서 36세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Margaret Elizabeth Chislington nasceu em 1366, em Baylham, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom filha de John Trehampton e Dama en Blanco. Ela casou-se com William Andrews aproximadamente 1396, em Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos. Ela faleceu em 20 de janeiro de 1402, em Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 36 anos, e foi sepultada em Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Margaret Elizabeth Chislington родилась в 1366 г. в местности беилхам, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания. Её родителей звали John Trehampton и Dama en Blanco. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Andrews около 1396 г. в местности суффолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына. Она умерла 20 января 1402 г. в местности суффолк, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 36 лет и была похоронена в местности Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Margaret Elizabeth Chislington nació en 1366, en Baylham, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido como hija de John Trehampton y Dama en Blanco. Se casó con William Andrews aproximadamente 1396, en Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos. Murió el 20 de enero de 1402, en Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 36 años, y fue sepultada en Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
